untranslatable_reason: This is a fixed-income multi-leg factor strategy requiring: (1) beta calculation across Treasury bond maturity buckets (1Y vs >10Y), (2) portfolio-level construction and weighting, (3) relative positioning (long vs short different maturity instruments). The allowed indicators are equity price/technical indicators and do not include bond-specific metrics (duration, yield curve positioning, beta by maturity bucket, Treasury excess returns). The strategy cannot be expressed as simple price/indicator thresholds on a single instrument.
translation_notes: BAB strategy requires constructing two separate Treasury bond portfolios with different maturity/beta characteristics and executing a pairs trade. This is a portfolio-construction and asset-allocation strategy, not a single-instrument technical signal. Implementation requires: (1) daily/monthly beta estimation on Treasury bond indices by maturity, (2) portfolio weighting optimization, (3) cross-asset relative value logic. Recommended approach: implement as a separate module using Treasury bond index data (e.g., 1Y and 10Y+ Treasury indices) with explicit beta calculations rather than technical indicators.
